labels.name: type:bug
labels.description: 缺陷或回归 / Defect or regression

labels.name: type:feature
labels.description: 功能或能力建议 / Feature or capability

labels.name: type:governance
labels.description: 治理、流程或标准变更 / Governance or policy

labels.name: area:platform
labels.description: Go CLI 与平台集成 / Go CLI and platform

labels.name: area:kit
labels.description: CodingKit 资产与生命周期 / CodingKit lifecycle

labels.name: area:plugin
labels.description: AiCoding plugin 安装与分发 / Plugin distribution

labels.name: area:skill
labels.description: Skill 路由与 source boundary / Skill routing

labels.name: area:docs
labels.description: README、规范与使用文档 / Documentation

labels.name: area:ci
labels.description: 验证、Hook 与 CI / Validation, Hook, and CI

labels.name: priority:p0
labels.description: 紧急事件或发布阻塞 / Incident or release blocker

labels.name: priority:p1
labels.description: 关键且立即处理 / Critical and immediate

labels.name: priority:p2
labels.description: 正常计划优先级 / Normal planned priority

labels.name: priority:p3
labels.description: 低紧急度或 backlog / Low urgency or backlog

labels.name: status:needs-triage
labels.description: 等待分类与所有权确认 / Awaiting triage

labels.name: status:needs-info
labels.description: 等待报告者补充信息 / More information required

labels.name: status:ready
labels.description: 范围清晰且可开始 / Ready for work

labels.name: status:in-progress
labels.description: 已有人负责并进行中 / Work in progress

labels.name: status:blocked
labels.description: 存在明确阻塞条件 / Explicitly blocked

labels.name: resolution:completed
labels.description: 验收条件已满足 / Acceptance criteria met

labels.name: resolution:duplicate
labels.description: 由另一 canonical Issue 跟踪 / Duplicate

labels.name: resolution:not-planned
labels.description: 经说明后不计划实施 / Not planned with rationale

labels.name: resolution:invalid
labels.description: 无效范围、假设或不可复现 / Invalid or unreproducible
